# Avatar
User avatar with image support and gradient fallback initials.
## Import
```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Avatar fallback="AU" size="md" intensity={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **fallback** (string) — default: `"AU"`: Fallback
- **size** (string) — default: `"md"`: Size
- **intensity** (number): Intensity
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add avatar
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/avatar
```
